---
title: "Research Methods in Analytics"
subtitle: "7002LBSAI — MSc Business Analytics and AI, LJMU"
---

## Welcome

This is the module page for **7002LBSAI Research Methods in Analytics**, part of the MSc Business Analytics and AI programme at Liverpool John Moores University.

This module is the statistical engine room of the MSc. It bridges from descriptive analytics to causal inference, and feeds directly into Predictive Analytics and Machine Learning.

---

## Module overview

| | |
|--|--|
| **Module code** | 7002LBSAI |
| **Credits** | 20 |
| **Delivery** | 11 × 3-hour workshops + 11 × 1-hour online sessions |
| **Assessment** | 40% examination, 60% applied project |
| **Start** | September 2026 |

---

## Module leader

**Dr Steve Nolan**
Liverpool Business School, LJMU
[S.P.Nolan\@ljmu.ac.uk](mailto:S.P.Nolan@ljmu.ac.uk)
